title: Agentforce Customer Stories - Salesforce
full_text:
Agentforce on Help has just been named the #1 Agentic Help Solution by Futurum Research
Read the report
Learn more
Read Customer Story
Customer Story
Bouygues Telecom serves more, faster as an Agentic Enterprise
See how Bouygues Telecom built an Agentic Enterprise with Agentforce and Data 360, setting a new bar for service in an ultra competitive telecom market.
Learn more
Customer Story
Bouygues Telecom brings consistency to every call with Agentforce
Agentic pre-call summaries and post-call follow-up drafts help every rep deliver the same quality across every interaction.
Learn more
Customer Story
Bouygues Telecom serves more, faster as an Agentic Enterprise
See how Bouygues Telecom built an Agentic Enterprise with Agentforce and Data 360, setting a new bar for service in an ultra competitive telecom market.
Learn more
Customer Story
Bouygues Telecom plans agentic field support for 10,000 technicians
Agentforce Field Service and Operations will give 10,000 technicians the context to arrive prepared, resolve issues faster, and complete more jobs per day.
Learn more
Customer Story
How Engine and NeuraFlash delivered a human-centric voice agent to scale service
Tom Hebner, SVP of Agentforce at NeuraFlash, explains how they turned early voice AI into a scalable, reliable solution that keeps customers engaged.
Learn more
Customer Story
How Goosehead Secures Data & Accelerates Development
Goosehead Insurance transformed data security and development speed with Agentforce 360—achieving 97% fewer errors and 90% faster cycles. Read their story.
Learn more
Customer Story
Thames Valley Police and Hampshire & Isle of Wight Constabulary deliver empathetic victim support on demand
A comprehensive, self-serve portal lets citizens check their case status and message directly with their officer — while also lowering contact center call volumes.
Learn more
Customer Story
Thames Valley Police and Hampshire & Isle of Wight Constabulary free up time and improve user experiences with agentic service
See how the two forces are using Agentforce and an integrated portal to serve members of the public faster, provide updates, and make reporting crimes easier.
Learn more
Customer Story
How BioIVT built agentic research quoting that gives service reps 43% more time for high-impact work
LaRae Bennett, BioIVT’s senior director of digital strategy, explains why the time was right for Agentforce — and how clean, unified data made all the difference.
Learn more
Customer Story
Agentic service to resolve 80% of customer FAQ for LY Corporation.
Agentforce resolves 25,000 customer FAQs a month on the Yahoo! JAPAN portal, with every answer grounded in trusted knowledge, order data, and case history.
Learn more
Customer Story
Unified data unlocks global hiring at scale for the Adecco Group.
Data 360 harmonizes candidate and client details into comprehensive profiles, powering real-time KPIs, smarter matching, and cross-region visibility.
Learn more
Customer Story
Agentic hiring processes help the Adecco Group deliver faster placements.
Agentforce captures job details from calls and emails, creates interview questions, drafts campaigns, and identifies top candidates in minutes instead of hours.
Learn more
Customer Story
Agentic prescreening helps the Adecco Group find top candidates fast.
Agentforce engages candidates as soon as they apply, capturing key details and surfacing top matches so recruiters can prioritize the strongest fits.
Learn more
Customer Story
The Adecco Group accelerates hiring worldwide as an Agentic Enterprise.
Learn how the Adecco Group uses Data 360 and Agentforce to accelerate hiring, prescreen candidates, and deliver real-time insights for faster, smarter recruiting.
Learn more
Customer Story
Salesforce delivers agentic support for 15 global events with one easy-to-configure build.
Low-code and no-code AI agent configuration makes it possible to support Salesforce’s biggest events without time-consuming customization.
Learn more
Customer Story
VentureCrowd: 75% Faster Agentic AI Deployment on Salesforce.
See how VentureCrowd used Agentforce 360 to slash deployment cycles by 75% and deliver secure, enterprise-grade AI agents on Australia’s leading investment platform.
Learn more
Customer Story
Rare supports rural farmers anytime, anywhere as an agentic nonprofit
See how Rare uses Agentforce to bring regenerative farming practices to more farmers and uses Salesforce CRM technology to manage grants and fundraising.
Learn more
Customer Story
Rare brings regenerative farming to more regions with one scalable CRM
Salesforce’s deeply unified platform connects the nonprofit’s farmer data, fundraising, and grant workflows — helping teams expand their impact and reach.
Learn more
Customer Story
Rare puts crop-specific advice in each farmer’s pocket with agentic coaching
Powered by Agentforce, Agent Tierra delivers guidance on everything from soil to weather via WhatsApp to help farmers boost yields and reduce agrochemical use.
Learn more
Customer Story
MIMIT Health creates a trusted system of context for every patient
Data 360 unifies patient data from multiple systems, giving care teams a real-time, complete picture to guide faster, more personalized care.
Learn more
Read all stories
Build agents fast.
Take a closer look at how agent building works in our library.
Watch demos
Get expert guidance.
Launch Agentforce with speed, confidence, and ROI you can measure.
See how
Talk to a rep.
Tell us about your business needs, and we’ll help you find answers.
Contact us
